name: Lathera
recipeIngredient: 4-5 medium zucchini, cut into 1/4 inch disks
3-4 medium potatoes, cut into 1/4 inch disks
1-2 medium onions, sliced into thick rings
1-2 medium tomatoes, sliced into 1/4 inch disks
1/2 cup olive oil (or any other oil)
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the zucchini, potatoes, onions, tomatoes, and garlic in loose layers in a baking tray. Place the onion rings at the bottom of the pan to allow them to become crispy, and position the tomato slices on top of the vegetables to let the juices drain down onto the other ingredients.
2. Bake for about 1 hour at medium oven temperature.
3. Add the oregano a few minutes before removing the tray from the oven to prevent burnt oregano, which can lose its flavor and have a bitter taste.
4. Allow the dish to cool before eating.
